description: Creates a BWT index from a sequence FASTA file for use with the BWA 0.7.4 aligners.
author: Heng Li, Broad Institute
plan:
## BWA.indexer GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
BWA.indexer is a GenePattern module that Creates a BWT index from a sequence FASTA file for use with the BWA 0.7.4 aligners.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: fasta.file, algorithm, output.prefix
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
perl /opt/genepatt/BWA.indexer/src/bwa_index_wrapper.pl -bwa <BWA_0.7.4>/bwa -libdir <libdir> -f <fasta.file> -a <algorithm> -o <output.prefix>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/bwa_modules\:v0.2

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: algorithm
parameters.description: The algorithm to use for constructing the BWT index

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: A prefix for the output file name.
